probes.name: mfa-schema-current
probes.description: The `webauthn_credentials` table has every column the module expects (id, identity_id, credential_id, public_key, attestation_format, transports, aaguid, sign_count, backup_eligible, backup_state, device_name, last_used_at, disabled_at, metadata, timestamps, soft-delete columns). Catches unmigrated environments before they crash on first WebAuthn registration.

probes.name: mfa-totp-library-loaded
probes.description: The `pragmarx/google2fa` package is available AND functional. Performs a round-trip test — generate a secret, compute a code for a fixed timestamp, verify — so a corrupt install or ABI mismatch after a PHP upgrade fails boot immediately.

probes.name: mfa-webauthn-library-loaded
probes.description: The `web-auth/webauthn-lib` package is available AND its dependent extensions (openssl, sodium) are loaded. Boot fails clearly when the WebAuthn stack is unavailable rather than silently degrading to TOTP-only.

probes.name: mfa-encryptor-reachable
probes.description: The MfaSecretEncryptor (from identity/identity) is reachable. Reuses identity/identity's `identity-kms-reachable` probe — this probe is a thin cross-module smoke test that MFA-side callers can hit KMS without a full-blown TOTP verification. Failure fails-open the enrolment endpoint but keeps verification working (existing enrolled Identities can still verify from the hot-cached data-key).

probes.name: mfa-challenge-ledger-reachable
probes.description: identity/auth's `auth_mfa_challenges` table is reachable AND writable. Performs a no-op INSERT + ROLLBACK inside a transaction to verify our repository bindings resolve. Because MFA challenge lifecycle depends on this table, unreachability blocks every MFA-required login.

probes.name: mfa-webauthn-preview-cache-reachable
probes.description: Redis is reachable + the `mfa:webauthn:register:challenge:*` key pattern responds. Non-critical because a Redis outage only blocks new WebAuthn registrations (existing WebAuthn credentials still verify since assertion verification is stateless server-side beyond sign_count).

probes.name: mfa-totp-preview-cache-reachable
probes.description: Redis is reachable + the `mfa:enroll:preview:*` key pattern responds. Same posture as the WebAuthn preview cache probe.

probes.name: mfa-suspicious-activity-scheduler-alive
probes.description: The suspicious-activity detector has evaluated within the last 5 minutes. Failure indicates the queue worker or the metrics-based signal source is stuck; brute-force patterns will not trigger alerts.

probes.name: mfa-retention-current
probes.description: CleanupDisabledWebauthnCredentialsJob has run within the last 25 hours. Missed runs risk breaching the 90-day disabled-credential retention commitment.
